title: Starmer Fires Senior U.K. Civil Servant Over Mandelson Revelations
summary_full: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office confirmed that Peter Mandelson, the former envoy to the United States, had been appointed despite failing to pass security vetting checks.
summary_public: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office confirmed that Peter Mandelson, the former envoy to the United States, had been appointed despite failing to pass security vetting checks.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: failing to pass security vetting checks
